response_parsed.reasoning: The call primarily focuses on the launch readiness of Comply v2, discussing various operational aspects such as compliance reporting, documentation, and the impact of a recent incident on project timelines. The participants are aligning on deadlines and addressing specific issues related to HIPAA and ISO 27001 reporting, as well as customer-facing documentation that poses a risk to the launch. They also touch on API functionality and rate limiting, indicating a comprehensive review of the product's readiness for release.
evidence_quotes: So the main thing I wanted to go through today is just the launch readiness checklist for Comply v2.
The HIPAA and ISO 27001 report generation — those are still being validated in staging and we've got some edge cases we're still working through.
I checked in with the content team yesterday and the HIPAA and ISO 27001 user guides are still in first draft.
